ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Copy
ast.target: 复制

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Rotate
ast.target: 旋转

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Restart server
ast.target: 重启服务器

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Copy log
ast.target: 复制日志

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste this into your AI client's MCP server config.
ast.target: 将此粘贴到您的 AI 客户端的 MCP 服务器配置中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Server not running. Enable at least one vault below.
ast.target: 服务器未运行。请在下方启用至少一个保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate a new bearer token (restarts the server).
ast.target: 生成新的承载令牌（将重启服务器）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: HTTP port (restart required).
ast.target: HTTP 端口（需要重启）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Block all mutating tools. Recommended when granting access to less-trusted clients.
ast.target: 阻止所有变更工具。在授予不太受信任的客户端访问权限时推荐使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max markdown files scanned per search.content / vault.info call (0 = unlimited).
ast.target: 每次 search.content / vault.info 调用扫描的最大 Markdown 文件数（0 = 无限制）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max raw bytes of file content read per search.content / vault.info call (0 = unlimited).
ast.target: 每次 search.content / vault.info 调用读取的最大原始文件内容字节数（0 = 无限制）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max number of ops in a single bulk.apply call (0 = unlimited).
ast.target: 单次 bulk.apply 调用中的最大操作数（0 = 无限制）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wall-clock time limit in milliseconds for long-walk tools (0 = no deadline). Best-effort: checked once per file.
ast.target: 长时间运行工具的墙钟时间限制（毫秒）（0 = 无截止时间）。尽力而为：每个文件检查一次。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: MCP Server URL
ast.target: MCP 服务器 URL

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Rotate token
ast.target: 轮换令牌

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Port
ast.target: 端口

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Read-only mode
ast.target: 只读模式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Max files scanned
ast.target: 最大扫描文件数

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Max bytes read
ast.target: 最大读取字节数

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Max bulk ops
ast.target: 最大批量操作数

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Deadline (ms)
ast.target: 截止时间（毫秒）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: URL copied.
ast.target: URL 已复制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Audit log copied.
ast.target: 审计日志已复制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: MCP token rotated.
ast.target: MCP 令牌已轮换。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Obsidian Native MCP: no vaults enabled.
ast.target: Obsidian 原生 MCP：未启用任何保险库。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional per-call budget overrides. Each field overrides the server default for this call only. 0 = unlimited.
ast.target: 可选的每次调用预算覆盖。每个字段仅覆盖本次调用的服务器默认值。0 = 无限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative directory
ast.target: 相对于保险库的目录

ast.name: description
ast.source: picomatch glob, matched against vault-relative path
ast.target: picomatch glob，与相对于保险库的路径匹配

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dot-notated key path, e.g. 'status.priority'
ast.target: 点分隔的键路径，例如 'status.priority'

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional per-call budget override. maxBulkOps overrides the server default for this call only. 0 = unlimited.
ast.target: 可选的每次调用预算覆盖。maxBulkOps 仅覆盖本次调用的服务器默认值。0 = 无限制。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected block-seq-ind on same line with key
ast.target: 同一行中出现意外的块序列索引与键

ast.name: summary
ast.source: List all configured vaults by name.
ast.target: 按名称列出所有已配置的保险库。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Get statistics for a single vault.
ast.target: 获取单个保险库的统计信息。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: List files/directories in the vault, optionally recursively, with optional glob filter.
ast.target: 列出保险库中的文件/目录，可选递归，并可选使用 glob 过滤器。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Find files by name (exact / substring / glob / regex).
ast.target: 按名称查找文件（精确/子字符串/glob/正则表达式）。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Read a file's full content. Returns content + content_hash + totalLines so subsequent surgical edits can use the hash as a precondition.
ast.target: 读取文件的完整内容。返回内容 + 内容哈希 + 总行数，以便后续精确编辑可使用哈希作为前置条件。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Read a line range from a file (1-based, inclusive). Returns the slice + rangeHash + contentHash for surgical follow-ups.
ast.target: 读取文件中的行范围（基于1，包含）。返回切片 + 范围哈希 + 内容哈希，用于精确后续操作。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Find headings by leaf text OR by full Parent::Child::Leaf path. Returns ALL matches; surgical-edit tools require disambiguation when count > 1.
ast.target: 通过叶子文本或完整的 父级::子级::叶子 路径查找标题。返回所有匹配项；当匹配数大于1时，精确编辑工具需要消歧。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Find a block-reference (^id) in a file. Returns line/structuralType/blockHash so block.replace can be called with the precondition.
ast.target: 在文件中查找块引用 (^id)。返回行/结构类型/块哈希，以便 block.replace 可以使用该前置条件调用。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Read the frontmatter (or a nested key via dot-notation) from a markdown file.
ast.target: 读取 Markdown 文件的 frontmatter（或通过点表示法读取嵌套键）。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: List tags found in a single file (when 'file' is supplied) or aggregated across the vault.
ast.target: 列出单个文件中（当提供 'file' 时）或整个保险库中聚合的标签。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Return outlinks (from the given file) and/or backlinks (vault-wide search for refs targeting the file's basename).
ast.target: 返回出链（来自给定文件）和/或反向链接（在整个保险库中搜索针对该文件基本名称的引用）。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Read structural metadata for a file: frontmatter, headings, tags, link counts, total lines, content_hash.
ast.target: 读取文件的结构元数据：frontmatter、标题、标签、链接计数、总行数、内容哈希。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Substring search across markdown files. Returns hits with surrounding context and per-line hashes (each hit can be surgically rewritten with str_replace).
ast.target: 在 Markdown 文件中进行子字符串搜索。返回匹配项及其周围上下文和每行哈希（每个匹配项都可以通过 str_replace 进行精确重写）。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: (planned) Diff a file against a prior content_hash. Stubbed for v1.0 — requires history cache; returns NOT_FOUND until enabled.
ast.target: （计划中）将文件与先前的内容哈希进行差异比较。v1.0 中为存根——需要历史缓存；启用前返回 NOT_FOUND。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Create a NEW file with the given content. Errors if the file already exists; use file.replace for overwrite.
ast.target: 使用给定内容创建一个新文件。如果文件已存在则报错；使用 file.replace 进行覆盖。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: HEAVY: replace the entire content of a file. Prefer str_replace / apply_patch / heading.replace_body / block.replace / frontmatter.set / lines.replace for surgical edits. Requires expected_content_hash unless create_if_missing is true and the file does not exist.
ast.target: 重量级操作：替换文件的全部内容。对于精确编辑，优先使用 str_replace / apply_patch / heading.replace_body / block.replace / frontmatter.set / lines.replace。除非 create_if_missing 为 true 且文件不存在，否则需要 expected_content_hash。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Append text to a file (creating it if missing). Cheap: no read of existing content required.
ast.target: 向文件追加文本（如果缺失则创建）。轻量级：无需读取现有内容。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Move or rename a file. Defaults to on_conflict='error' — never silently overwrites.
ast.target: 移动或重命名文件。默认 on_conflict='error'——绝不静默覆盖。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Delete a file. Default trash=true → moved to <vault>/.obsidian/trash. Hard delete (trash=false) requires expected_content_hash.
ast.target: 删除文件。默认 trash=true → 移至 <vault>/.obsidian/trash。硬删除 (trash=false) 需要 expected_content_hash。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Surgical edit: replace a literal substring in a file. Default occurrence='unique' (errors on >1 match). Tiny payload in/out; preferred over file.replace for any edit smaller than the whole file.
ast.target: 精确编辑：替换文件中的字面量子字符串。默认 occurrence='unique'（匹配数大于1时报错）。输入/输出负载小；对于任何小于整个文件的编辑，优于 file.replace。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Replace a contiguous line range (1-based, inclusive). Requires expected_range_hash returned by file.read_range or outline (section_hash).
ast.target: 替换连续的行范围（基于1，包含）。需要 file.read_range 或 outline（section_hash）返回的 expected_range_hash。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Insert content before line N (1-based). Use line=totalLines+1 to append. No hash precondition required.
ast.target: 在第 N 行之前插入内容（基于1）。使用 line=totalLines+1 追加。无需哈希前置条件。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Replace the BODY beneath a heading (not the heading line itself). Errors if heading missing or path is ambiguous. Requires expected_section_hash from heading.find/outline.
ast.target: 替换标题下的正文（不包括标题行本身）。如果标题缺失或路径不明确则报错。需要 heading.find/outline 提供的 expected_section_hash。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Rename a heading's text in place. Errors on missing/duplicate. Preserves heading level. Does NOT update backlinks (use bulk.apply for that).
ast.target: 就地重命名标题文本。缺失/重复时报错。保留标题级别。不更新反向链接（使用 bulk.apply 进行更新）。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Rename a block reference (^old → ^new) on the same line, preserving line content.
ast.target: 在同一行上重命名块引用 (^old → ^new)，保留行内容。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Set a (possibly nested via dot-notation) key in the file's frontmatter. Creates the frontmatter block if absent. Requires expected_frontmatter_hash unless file has no frontmatter yet.
ast.target: 设置文件 frontmatter 中的（可能通过点表示法嵌套的）键。如果 frontmatter 块不存在则创建。除非文件尚无 frontmatter，否则需要 expected_frontmatter_hash。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Delete a (possibly nested) key from the file's frontmatter. No-op if key absent. Requires expected_frontmatter_hash when frontmatter exists.
ast.target: 从文件的 frontmatter 中删除（可能嵌套的）键。如果键不存在则无操作。当 frontmatter 存在时需要 expected_frontmatter_hash。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Apply a unified diff to a file. Context lines (' ' prefix) are validated verbatim per hunk — the diff IS the content precondition. expected_content_hash is optional belt-and-suspenders. Use this for multi-hunk surgical edits.
ast.target: 将统一差异应用于文件。上下文行（' ' 前缀）在每个块中逐字验证——差异本身就是内容前置条件。expected_content_hash 是可选的额外保障。用于多块精确编辑。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Obsidian Native MCP
ast.target: Obsidian 原生 MCP

ast.name: text
ast.source: Vaults
ast.target: 保险库

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tools
ast.target: 工具

ast.name: text
ast.source: Disable individual tools you don't want exposed (default: regex.replace off).
ast.target: 禁用您不想暴露的单个工具（默认：regex.replace 关闭）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Performance budgets
ast.target: 性能预算

ast.name: text
ast.source: Limits for long-running operations. 0 = unlimited (default). Raise freely for large vaults or batch workflows.
ast.target: 长时间运行操作的限制。0 = 无限制（默认）。对于大型保险库或批量工作流，可自由提高。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Recent audit log
ast.target: 最近审计日志

ast.name: text
ast.source: No Obsidian vaults detected.
ast.target: 未检测到 Obsidian 保险库。
